query: Explain when I should use traces, metrics, logs, and profiles together in OpenTelemetry.
Review our OpenTelemetry Collector YAML for missing queues, unsafe listeners, and processor ordering.

Our otel gateway queue keeps filling and spans are being dropped. Help me isolate the bottleneck.
Design a resilient OpenTelemetry Collector topology that can tolerate a backend outage.
Check whether our baggage and resource attributes could leak customer data.
Plan a zero-code observability rollout for Linux workloads using the Operator or OBI.
How should we migrate Prometheus metric collection into an OTLP and Collector architecture?
Create an operational migration plan from OpenTracing to OpenTelemetry without breaking dashboards.
Why are traces split after they cross a service boundary even though both services export spans?
Write C# ActivitySource instrumentation for my ASP.NET Core checkout endpoint.
Show me the Java OpenTelemetry SDK calls needed to create a custom histogram.
Implement a custom OpenTelemetry Collector receiver in Go.
Build the OpenTelemetry Collector from source with a custom exporter.

Troubleshoot why my Kubernetes Deployment cannot pull its application image.
Compare the current pricing of Datadog, New Relic, and Honeycomb.
Create OpenAPI documentation for my REST endpoints.
